lines: distribute_sort_row_count_thresholdSets the minimum number of rows estimated to be processed by the Sort operator to distribute the plan.1000No-

distsqlControls the query distribution mode for the session. By default, CockroachDB determines which queries benefit from distributed execution. Distribution thresholds for specific operations are controlled by `distribute_group_by_row_count_threshold`, `distribute_scan_row_count_threshold`, and `distribute_sort_row_count_threshold`.autoNosql.defaults.distsql
distsql_plan_gateway_biasControls how many more partition spans the gateway node can be assigned compared to other nodes when distributing SQL execution.2No-

+distsql_plan_locality_filterRestricts DistSQL physical planning to SQL instances whose locality matches the supplied filter, expressed as a CockroachDB locality string (e.g. `region=us-east1,zone=us-east1-a`). Only instances whose locality contains every key/value pair in the filter are considered when assigning flow components for this session's queries. The empty string (default) disables the filter. This affects DistSQL physical planning only and does not change optimizer decisions. By default, when no instance matches, the gateway falls back to its standard instance selection; set `distsql_plan_locality_filter_strict` to instead return an error in that case.-No-

+distsql_plan_locality_filter_strictWhen true, DistSQL physical planning returns an error if no SQL instance matches `distsql_plan_locality_filter` instead of falling back to the gateway and other instances. Has no effect when `distsql_plan_locality_filter` is empty.offNo-
distsql_prevent_partitioning_soft_limited_scansControls whether the DistSQL planner prevents partitioning of soft-limited scans across multiple nodes.onNo-
distsql_use_reduced_leaf_write_setsControls whether distributed SQL uses reduced write sets for leaf transactions.onNo-
distsql_workmemDetermines how much RAM (in bytes) a single operation of a single query can use before it has to spill to disk.64 MiBNosql.distsql.temp_storage.workmem

distribute_sort_row_count_threshold                              1000                Sets the minimum number of rows estimated to be processed by the Sort operator to distribute the plan.

distsql                                                          off                 Controls the query distribution mode for the session. By default, CockroachDB determines which queries benefit from distributed execution. Distribution thresholds for specific operations are controlled by `distribute_group_by_row_count_threshold`, `distribute_scan_row_count_threshold`, and `distribute_sort_row_count_threshold`.

distsql_plan_gateway_bias                                        2                   Controls how many more partition spans the gateway node can be assigned compared to other nodes when distributing SQL execution.

+distsql_plan_locality_filter                                     ·                   Restricts DistSQL physical planning to SQL instances whose locality matches the supplied filter, expressed as a CockroachDB locality string (e.g. `region=us-east1,zone=us-east1-a`). Only instances whose locality contains every key/value pair in the filter are considered when assigning flow components for this session's queries. The empty string (default) disables the filter. This affects DistSQL physical planning only and does not change optimizer decisions. By default, when no instance matches, the gateway falls back to its standard instance selection; set `distsql_plan_locality_filter_strict` to instead return an error in that case.

+distsql_plan_locality_filter_strict                              off                 When true, DistSQL physical planning returns an error if no SQL instance matches `distsql_plan_locality_filter` instead of falling back to the gateway and other instances. Has no effect when `distsql_plan_locality_filter` is empty.
distsql_prevent_partitioning_soft_limited_scans                  on                  Controls whether the DistSQL planner prevents partitioning of soft-limited scans across multiple nodes.
distsql_use_reduced_leaf_write_sets                              on                  Controls whether distributed SQL uses reduced write sets for leaf transactions.
enable_auto_rehoming                                             off                 Controls whether auto-rehoming is enabled for REGIONAL BY ROW tables.
+# Test that the locality filter actually controls DistSQL flow placement in a
+# multi-node cluster with locality assignments. The multiregion-9node-3region-3azs
+CREATE TABLE lf_distributed (k INT PRIMARY KEY, v INT)
+INSERT INTO lf_distributed SELECT i, i FROM generate_series(1, 9) AS g(i)
+# Split into 3 ranges and place one in each region.
+# Verify data placement: ranges on nodes in 3 different regions.
+SELECT start_key, end_key, replicas, lease_holder from [SHOW RANGES FROM TABLE lf_distributed WITH DETAILS]
+# Without a locality filter, a full scan distributes flows to all three regions.
+# With the filter set to us-east-1, scan flows should move off non-matching
+# nodes (1-6) onto us-east-1 nodes (7-9). The gateway (node 1) still
+# Narrowing further to a specific AZ restricts to node 7 plus the gateway

// OptimizerSpanLimit sets the maximum number of constraint spans allowed in
// a scan during query optimization. 0 means no limit. Default: 131072.
+  // DistSQLPlanLocalityFilter restricts the set of SQL instances that the
+  // DistSQL physical planner will consider when assigning flow components for
+  // queries from this session. The value is a CockroachDB locality string
+  // matches every key/value pair in the filter are eligible. The empty string
+  // disables the filter and is the default. The filter is consumed only on the
+  // gateway during physical planning, so it does not need to be propagated to
+  // DistSQLPlanLocalityFilterStrict, when true, causes physical planning to
+  // return an error if no SQL instance matches DistSQLPlanLocalityFilter
+  // instead of falling back to the gateway / random instance selection.
